steps.title: Convert percentages to decimal form
steps.content: 2,088% = 20.88 and 87% = 0.87. The given conditions are: $$a = 20.88(b + c)$$ and $$b = 0.87c$$

steps.title: Express both variables in terms of a single variable
steps.content: Since $b = 0.87c$, we have $b + c = 0.87c + c = 1.87c$. Substitute into the equation for $a$: $$a = 20.88(1.87c)$$ Multiply: $20.88 \times 1.87 = 39.0456$, so $$a = 39.0456c$$

steps.title: Find what percent of b is a
steps.content: The ratio is $$\frac{a}{b} = \frac{39.0456c}{0.87c} = \frac{39.0456}{0.87} = 44.88$$ Convert to percentage: $44.88 \times 100\% = 4488\%$. A is correct.
